pr.title: Add: 11L Complement Training + TTT + No-JEPA submission (val_bpb 1.0855)

output.summary: Combines complement loss weighting to focus on hard tokens with TTT adaptation and disables JEPA during 8xA100 training.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT adapts the model by training on validation tokens before evaluation.
techniques: complement loss weighting to downweight bigram-predicted tokens
test-time training adapts all blocks with AdamW
disables JEPA module to simplify inference
